Report on Promising Strategies to End Youth Homelessness, , , provided that, not later than 2 years after , the Secretary of Health and Human Services, in consultation with the United States Interagency Council on Homelessness, was to submit to the Congress a report on promising strategies to end youth homelessness.Pub.
